name: DSG Governance Gate
description: DSG Platform provides automated risk governance and compliance infrastructure for digital enterprises. The DSG Governance Gate Stripe app evaluates policy decisions directly inside your payment detail view, surfacing real-time status details including policy versions, proof references, and clear verification time logs.
shortDescription: Real-time governance and compliance status on payment details

views.name: payment.detail
views.title: DSG Governance Gate
views.description: Policy evaluation and compliance status for payment events

content_security_policy.purpose: Connect to DSG governance API for policy evaluation and audit recording

features.title: Real-Time Policy Evaluation
features.description: View ALLOW, BLOCK, or REVIEW decisions from the DSG control plane directly on payment details, with policy version and proof reference tracking.

features.title: Governance Audit Trail
features.description: Every policy decision is timestamped and versioned, providing a complete audit trail for compliance reviews and regulatory reporting.

features.title: Safe Failure Mode
features.description: If the governance service is unreachable, the app displays REVIEW status—never auto-allowing transactions. This ensures maximum safety during service interruptions.

permissions.name: External access
permissions.description: The app sends policy decisions and audit logs to the DSG control plane for governance enforcement.
